name: Saguaro
description: A nursery of cactuses on warm dust — every redraw regrows each arm and re-pots the row at golden hour.

code.style: --rule: ( border-bottom: calc(36px / @Y) solid rgba(140, 91, 66, 0.55); box-sizing: border-box; /* trunk and arm share one emitted green */ --cact: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --ah: @r(30, 52); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 42%; width: 16%; bottom: 0; height: @rand(52%, 78%); border-radius: 99px 99px 0 0; background: @var(--cact); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @p(22%, 62%); width: 14%; bottom: calc(@var(--ah) * 1%); height: @rand(16%, 26%); border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--cact); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
